assignments.twist: a coupled pair of Fokker-Planck-type kinetic equations with state-dependent (multiplicative) diffusion for two interacting populations' distribution densities
the macroscopic mean-value dynamics of the two coupled populations obey a predator-prey Lotka-Volterra ODE system driving the kinetic densities

core_model_summary: A system of coupled Fokker-Planck kinetic equations for the distribution densities of two pairwise-interacting populations whose mean values evolve according to Lotka-Volterra predator-prey dynamics, used to track inequality via the coefficient of variation.
